title: Minestuck: More Faygo
description: Adds most missing Faygo flavors to Minestuck
body:
[Minestuck](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minestuck) by default adds 9 flavors of Faygo. This mod raises that number to 35. All flavors of Faygo, excluding diet and Ohana are now availible in Minestuck.

This mod also adds Faygo Enchanted Gold, which has all the same effects of an Enchanted Golden Apple. All of the new flavors are obtained through recipes using the Totem Lathe and Punch Designix.

It also adds storage blocks for every flavor of Faygo.

![All flavors of Faygo added by this addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tv2nPFOF/images/4edf943cc6da8984393483848e936a47625f4191.png)
